name: Carhartt Men's Loose Fit Heavyweight Short-Sleeve Pocket T-Shirt
desc: Heavyweight cotton t-shirt with a relaxed fit and chest pocket. Built tough for work or casual wear with Carhartt's signature durability.

name: Levi's Men's 511 Slim Fit Jeans
desc: Classic slim fit jeans that sit below the waist with a slim leg from hip to ankle. Versatile style for everyday casual wear.

name: Amazon Essentials Men's Regular-Fit Long-Sleeve Plaid Flannel Shirt
desc: Soft flannel shirt in a classic plaid pattern. Regular fit for comfortable all-day wear. Perfect for layering in cooler months.

name: Columbia Men's Steens Mountain Full Zip 2.0 Soft Fleece Jacket
desc: Cozy full-zip fleece jacket with two hand pockets. Lightweight warmth perfect for layering or wearing on its own in mild weather.

name: Hanes Men's EcoSmart Fleece Pullover Hoodie Sweatshirt
desc: Made with up to 5% recycled plastic bottles. Soft fleece with a kangaroo pocket and ribbed cuffs and waistband for a cozy fit.

name: IZOD Men's Advantage Performance Flat Front Straight Fit Chino Pant
desc: Stretch performance chino pants with moisture-wicking technology. Straight fit with a flat front for a polished casual look.

name: Under Armour Men's Tech 2.0 Short Sleeve T-Shirt
desc: Ultra-soft, textured fabric with moisture-wicking properties. Anti-odor technology keeps you fresh during workouts and daily activities.

name: Wrangler Authentics Men's Classic 5-Pocket Regular Fit Cotton Jean
desc: Classic 5-pocket jeans with a regular fit through the seat and thigh. Durable cotton denim built to last through everyday wear.

name: Amazon Essentials Men's Slim-Fit Short-Sleeve V-Neck T-Shirt, Pack of 5
desc: Pack of 5 slim-fit V-neck tees in everyday essential colors. Soft cotton blend fabric perfect for layering or wearing solo.

name: Goodthreads Men's Slim-Fit Long-Sleeve Henley Shirt
desc: Soft, washed fabric henley with a slim fit. Casual button placket design perfect for relaxed everyday wear.
